provider: CUHK Department of Sports Science and Physical Education JS4320 Study Scheme and Course List
note: The official Study Scheme lists SPED3910 both as a required Core Course and as a Health Studies Elective. It also states 30 Core units although the eleven listed 3-unit courses total 33 units. SPED3910 is stored once under its first published role and the conflict requires manual review; no Year or Semester is inferred.
